name: NEW_TARGETS_RECENT_YEARS
description: List targets whose first publication is within the most recent N years (default 3).
cypher:
WITH coalesce($years, 3) AS years
MATCH (t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH t, min(y.year) AS first_year, years
WITH t, first_year, years, date().year AS current_year
WHERE first_year >= (current_year - years + 1)
RETURN t.symbol AS target, first_year
ORDER BY first_year DESC, target
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which targets first appeared in the last 3 years?
